name: 石川指间香烟
wear: 夹在石川悠一右手指间
shooting_angle: 画面中心偏下，靠近西装袖口，非特写，中等距离展示

reference_prompt: A realistic cigarette prop, white paper tube with light brown filter tip, approximately 84mm long and 8mm diameter, slender cylindrical shape, held statically between the right fingers of a character in a suit, no visible text, subtle natural micro-movement only with hand breathing or slight gestures, no additional actions or close-ups on the prop itself, consistent single instance throughout shots.。源记录硬约束：数量:1根；位置:首帧位于石川悠一右手指间，画面中心偏下，靠近旧西装卷起的袖口；运动政策:本镜头内保持静态夹持，只允许随呼吸产生极小幅度自然稳定晃动

source_contract.position: 首帧位于石川悠一右手指间，画面中心偏下，靠近旧西装卷起的袖口
